predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The employee criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual average employees > 50).

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The turnover criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (annual net turnover excl. VAT > 11,250,000 EUR).

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year (balance sheet total > 6,000,000 EUR).

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: Not more than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the financial year.

predicates.name: following_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year immediately follows the first financial year (Y1, Y2 where Y2 follows Y1).

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_second_consecutive_time
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company for the second consecutive time in this financial year (Y2), meaning it was also exceeded in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_no_longer_exceeded_second_consecutive_time
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is no longer exceeded for the company for the second consecutive time in this financial year (Y2), meaning it was also not exceeded in the immediately preceding financial year and was exceeded before that.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_before
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion was exceeded for the company before the given financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company in the given financial year, assessed on the balance sheet date of the last closed financial year.

predicates.name: small_company_status_change_takes_effect_from
predicates.description: A change in the small company status of the company takes effect from this financial year (the year following the second consecutive year in which the exceeding or no-longer-exceeding condition held).

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company excluding value added tax in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year, in euros.

functions.name: last_closed_financial_year
functions.description: The last closed financial year of the company on the balance sheet date.
